violations.text: Staff failed to sanitize equipment and utensils after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025
Drinks were observed stored on the floor in the kitchen. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025
Inspector observed desserts, located in reach-in freezer, uncovered and unprotected from contamination. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025

Single service items (cups) were observed stored on the floor in the kitchen. Single service items must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025

The front window along the food prep table is in poor repair (cracked). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. A piece of plexiglass has been installed temporarily, with professional glass installation scheduled for the week of April 14th. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025

Utensils are displayed with the food contact surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2025
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2025

The floor and wall junctures in the areas of the kitchen do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025
The front window above food prep table is in poor repair, cracked. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the establishment. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025

The area outside along the building has an accumulation of vegetation, wood boards, and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025
Ceiling light panel in front area has an accumulation of dead insects. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025
One ceiling light panel was nonfunctional during inspection. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025
